# HeyGen vs Synthesia

- **URL:** https://www.synthesia.io/alternatives/synthesia-vs-heygen
- **Score:** 89/100 — Critical
- **Findings:** 7
- **Last checked:** 2026-04-24
- **Last change detected:** 2026-04-24

## 🆕 Feature (2)

### 1. 🔴 Confirmed

**Where on the page:** section **Ready to try our AI video platform? (pre-footer CTA)** · line 647

**Quote from page:**
> start making AI videos with 240+ avatars in 140+ languages

**Suggested fix:**
> Synthesia now advertises **160+ languages** on the homepage (avatars count of 240+ is still correct). Update '140+ languages' → '160+ languages'.

**Source:** https://www.synthesia.io — Checked 2026-04-24 — Synthesia marketing says '160+ languages' and '1000+ AI voices'

### 2. 🔴 Confirmed

**Where on the page:** section **Is HeyGen AI free or paid? (FAQ)** · line 622

**Quote from page:**
> access to 120+ avatars and 300+ voices

**Suggested fix:**
> HeyGen's pricing page now advertises **500+ stock avatars** (not 120+). The 300+ voices claim is no longer prominently advertised by HeyGen — consider removing the specific count or updating to 'hundreds of voices'. Suggested: '500+ stock avatars and a large voice library' or verify current HeyGen numbers.

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Checked 2026-04-24 — HeyGen pricing shows 500+ stock avatars on Free plan


## 🔗 Link (1)

### 1. ⚪ Flagged for review

**Where on the page:** section **Leader in the AI Video Generator category** · line 450

**Quote from page:**
> https://www.g2.com/categories/video-communications?...

**Suggested fix:**
> G2 returns 403 to bots — can't confirm liveness from this tool. Link is likely still live for real users. Manual spot-check recommended.


## 💰 Pricing (5)

### 1. 🔴 Confirmed

**Where on the page:** section **HeyGen plans (pricing comparison table)** · line 435

**Quote from page:**
> Team · $39/mo/seat · unlimited minutes of video/year. Billed yearly.

**Suggested fix:**
> HeyGen no longer has a 'Team' plan. Current tiers above Creator are **Pro ($99/mo)** and **Business ($149/mo, up to 60 min per video, additional seats $20/seat)**. Replace 'Team $39/mo/seat' with Business, or remove the tier entirely.

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Checked 2026-04-24 — no Team plan at any price exists

### 2. 🔴 Confirmed

**Where on the page:** section **HeyGen plans (pricing comparison table)** · line 423

**Quote from page:**
> Creator · $29/seat · unlimited minutes of video/year. Billed yearly.

**Suggested fix:**
> Two issues: (a) HeyGen's Creator plan is **not billed per-seat** (single-user plan, no seat concept); (b) it does **not** include unlimited minutes — **30 min per video cap**. Suggested: 'Creator · $29/mo · videos up to 30 min · billed monthly or annually'.

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Per-seat billing only applies to Business tier ($20/extra seat). Creator is single-user with a 30-min-per-video cap.

### 3. 🔴 Confirmed

**Where on the page:** section **How much is HeyGen? (FAQ)** · line 641

**Quote from page:**
> **Creator**: $24 per month (max. 5 minutes per video).

**Suggested fix:**
> HeyGen's Creator is now **$29/mo** (billed monthly; annual discount available) and the per-video duration cap was raised from 5 min → **30 min**.

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Checked 2026-04-24

### 4. 🔴 Confirmed

**Where on the page:** section **How much is HeyGen? (FAQ)** · line 642

**Quote from page:**
> **Teams:** $69 per month (max. 60 minutes per video).

**Suggested fix:**
> HeyGen no longer has a 'Teams' plan. Replace with **Business: $149/mo (up to 60 min per video, $20 per additional seat)**, or remove the tier line.

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Checked 2026-04-24 — no Team/Teams tier at any price

### 5. 🟡 Likely

**Where on the page:** section **Is HeyGen worth it? (FAQ)** · line 630

**Quote from page:**
> Synthesia starts at $18/month whereas HeyGens start at $24/month

**Suggested fix:**
> Synthesia $18/mo is still correct (annual billing). HeyGen's Creator is now $29/mo billed monthly — the blog's $24/month figure appears to match an older annual rate that may no longer apply. Suggested: 'Synthesia starts at $18/month (annual) whereas HeyGen's paid plans start at $29/month.'

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Verify HeyGen's current annual rate manually before shipping


## 📊 Stat (2)

### 1. ⚪ Flagged for review

**Where on the page:** section **(multiple)**

**Quote from page:**
> (informational) Still-current claims verified 2026-04-24

**Suggested fix:**
> No change needed for: Synthesia pricing $0/mo Basic, $18/mo Starter (annual), $64/mo Creator (annual); Synthesia 240+ avatars; HeyGen Free $0/mo for 1 min per video; 'over 90% of Fortune 100'; '50,000+ companies' (now phrased as '50,000+ teams globally'). All match live sources.

### 2. ⚪ Flagged for review

**Where on the page:** section **Who owns HeyGen? (FAQ)** · line 631

**Quote from page:**
> HeyGen was started in 2020 in China.

**Suggested fix:**
> Historical fact — won't become outdated. No action.
